old_claim.note: Pottery provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim_absent: The Dhra structures are explicitly Pre-Pottery Neolithic and therefore do not depend on pottery containers.

source_shape.source_locator: Abstract and Figure 2 caption: identify purpose-built granaries at Dhra' around 11,300-11,175 cal BP, before plant domestication, with suspended wooden floors and mud walls.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: Dhra' had purpose-built predomestication granaries with suspended floors and mud walls around 11,300-11,175 cal BP.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: The scoped evidence establishes the milestone without the removed dependency. The Dhra structures are explicitly Pre-Pottery Neolithic and therefore do not depend on pottery containers.

ontology_before: granaries treated pottery as a direct causal prerequisite.
ontology_after: granaries is scoped to the directly evidenced mechanism and no longer claims pottery as a prerequisite.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed and locked by graph invariant 2026-07-12-structural-accuracy-batch: granaries no longer directly depends on pottery.
would_reject_if: A reliable source demonstrates that every implementation within the current granaries scope technically requires pottery.
short_reason: The Dhra structures are explicitly Pre-Pottery Neolithic and therefore do not depend on pottery containers.
